title: PR4 3NA, Mr Robert Towers, Mr Benjamin Towers and Ms Jane Towers environmental permit issued - EPR/EP3020LJ/A001
body: "The Environment Agency publish permits that they issue under the Industrial Emissions Directive (IED).  This decision includes the permit and decision document for:   Operator name: Mr Robert Towers, Mr Benjamin Towers and Ms Jane Towers Installation name: The Junctions Permit number: EPR/EP3020LJ/A001  "
